revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Anekōji]][[ja:姉小路]]
'''Anekōji''' (姉小路 / あねこうじ / あねがこうじ / あねのこうじ / あねやこうじ) * {{ill|Anekōji-dōri|ja|姉小路通|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anekōji-dōri|1=Aneyakōji Street|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11447253}} - A street in {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|qid=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}. The origin of the names listed below. * Japanese surnames ** {{ill|Anenokōji clan|en|Anenokōji clan|qid=Q2975216|lt=Anekōji family|1=Anenokōji clan}} - A family lineage of the {{ill|Fujiwara clan|en|Fujiwara clan|qid=Q641628|lt=Fujiwara clan|1=Fujiwara clan}}. Multiple branches exist. *** Kan'in branch of the Anekōji family - A {{ill|Kuge|en|Kuge|qid=Q1196276|lt=Kuge|1=Kuge}} {{ill|Buke|ja|羽林家|1=Baronial Houses|1=Baronial Houses|2=ja|3=羽林家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Buke|qq=}} family and later a {{ill|Kazoku|en|Kazoku|qid=Q241734|lt=kazoku|1=Kazoku}} family with the Rank of {{ill|Count|en|Count|qid=Q3519259|lt=Count|1=Count}}. *** Hida Kokushi Anekōji family - A family that inherited the position of Hida provincial governor. **** {{ill|Anekōji clan|en|Anekōji clan|qid=Q10943126|lt=Anekōji clan|1=Anekōji clan}} - A {{ill|sengoku daimyō|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/sengoku daimyō|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}} clan in {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|qid=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province|1=Hida Province}}. * {{ill|Ōoku|en|Ōoku|qid=Q1064983|lt=Ōoku|1=Ōoku}} Senior Ladies-in-Waiting ** {{ill|Anekōji no Tsubone|ja|姉小路局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anekōji no Tsubone|qq=}} - A senior lady-in-waiting during the era of the 4th Shogun {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|qid=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} of the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ** {{ill|Anekōji (Wakamiya’s grandaunt)|ja|姉小路 (和宮の大叔母)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anekōji (Wakamiya’s grandaunt)|1=Anenokōji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10943123}} - A senior lady-in-waiting during the era of the 12th Shogun {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|qid=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Ieyoshi|1=Tokugawa Ieyoshi}}. She was the grandaunt of {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|qid=Q907048|lt=Princess Kazunomiya Chikako|1=Chikako, Princess Kazu}} through her maternal grandfather's sister.
{{translated page|ja|姉小路|version=101230267|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:姉小路]]
